description: Product Description WANT TO KNOW MORE? COLOURS Available in 25 colours. SIZES Available in sizes 0-3 Months up to 2-3 Years. FABRIC Soft and stretchy fabric. 100% (Organic or in Conversion to Organic) Cotton. CARE INSTRUCTIONS Wash at 40°C. Wash inside out. Reshape while damp. Do not tumble dry. WHY USE ORGANIC COTTON? The cotton textile industry is the second most polluting industry after oil. Organic cotton is the friendly alternative to traditional cotton. WHAT MAKES ORGANIC COTTON BETTER? Organic cotton is grown ecologically from natural compost which replaces chemical pesticides and fertilisers. DOES ORGANIC COTTON PRODUCTION NEED TO USE THE SAME AMOUNT OF WATER? No! Organic cotton allows us to save considerable quantities of our most precious resource! Around 2,500 litres of water are needed to produce a classic cotton adult t-shirt compared with just 100 litres for an organic cotton t-shirt.
